studies.title: Evaluating the Effectiveness of an Unguided Digital Therapeutic for Breast Cancer Survivors – optimune – Randomized Controlled Trial

_verification.reason: The study is specifically about the digital therapeutic product 'optimune', as evidenced by its mention in the title and detailed description in the full text. The study investigates the effectiveness of the 'optimune' program for breast cancer survivors.

_classification.reason: The study is explicitly described as a 'randomized controlled trial' and involves random allocation of participants to an intervention group and a control group, which are key features of an RCT.
